category_sources: source_facts.description says http-server is a simple zero-configuration command-line HTTP server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives http-server; current_curation.display-name also gives http-server.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official source-control project URL; source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a command-line HTTP server; official GitHub README describes static HTTP server usage.
